summary: ch19 reduced companion (two-phase execute_model/sample_tokens split, f13 persistent-batch write-back, CUDA-graph dispatch) reproduces the real vLLM behaviors documented in the dossier. All 15 host tests pass; lint_fidelity reports no BLOCKING issues.

test_run.environment: host (CPU only, no CUDA/vLLM import needed)
test_run.docker_note: No container needed: tests use tiny deterministic StubModel/StubSampler and never import vllm or touch CUDA. The Triton slot_mapping kernel in _prepare_inputs is CUDA-guarded (device.type=='cuda'); on host CPU the index_select read-back path (the f13 closure under test) runs without it.

fidelity_lint.result: PASS — 保真度检查全部通过 (no BLOCKING)

behaviors_verified_against_real_source.behavior: Two-phase contract: execute_model() returns None and caches a 10-field ExecuteModelState into the single self.execute_model_state slot
behaviors_verified_against_real_source.source: vllm/v1/worker/gpu_model_runner.py:L4156-L4175 (cache + return None) — verbatim in reduced gpu_model_runner.py:L610-L626

behaviors_verified_against_real_source.behavior: Entry assertion: a second execute_model() before sample_tokens() raises RuntimeError("sample_tokens() must be called ...")
sample_tokens() unpacks state, resets slot to None, samples; None-slot case is a no-op empty output

behaviors_verified_against_real_source.source: vllm/v1/worker/gpu_model_runner.py:L3479-L3505 — write-back loop matches (only ch18-subtracted is_token_ids line and async -1 placeholder removed, both approved)

behaviors_verified_against_real_source.behavior: req_output_token_ids[slot] is the SAME list object as CachedRequestState.output_token_ids (aliasing)
f13 read-back closure: next step's _prepare_inputs index_selects exactly the token written back (token_indices = positions + slot*max_model_len)
CudagraphDispatcher.dispatch: NONE on uninitialized/mode==NONE/over-max-size; FULL on exact num_reqs key; PIECEWISE on relaxed (num_reqs=None) key; NONE fallback
behaviors_verified_against_real_source.source: vllm/v1/cudagraph_dispatcher.py:L234-L323 — dispatch body verbatim, only LoRA normalization subtracted

behaviors_verified_against_real_source.behavior: _determine_batch_execution_and_padding routes through the dispatcher and yields the runtime mode

notes: Implementation files (gpu_model_runner.py, cudagraph_dispatcher.py) cross-checked line-by-line against vLLM source at pin f3fef1235: execute_model entry assertion, ExecuteModelState cache + return None, _bookkeeping_sync write-back loop, and dispatch FULL->PIECEWISE->NONE selection are faithful subtract-only reductions. All must_keep symbols present. No fabrication of behavior beyond the real source.
